summary: VenuLoQ Brand Logo Unification Testing Complete - All 12 features verified on mobile viewport (390x844). BrandLogo component successfully renders the VenuLoQ serif wordmark with golden Q (#D4B36A) consistently across all pages. Old 'VENU|LOQ' branding removed everywhere.

landing_page_header_logo.details: Landing page / loads with VenuLoQ serif logo in header - BrandLogo component with data-testid='brand-logo'

landing_page_footer_logo.details: Footer shows VenuLoQ logo with 'FIND. COMPARE. LOCK.' tagline in footer section

search_page_logo.details: Search page /venues/search shows VenuLoQ serif logo in mobile header

login_page_logo.details: Login page /login shows VenuLoQ serif logo on dark hero image overlay (cream VenuLo + gold Q)

register_page_logo.details: Register page /register shows VenuLoQ serif logo on dark hero image with tagline visible

venue_detail_logo.details: Venue detail page /venues/mumbai/taj-mahal-palace-mumbai shows VenuLoQ logo in header

dashboard_logo.details: Admin dashboard shows VenuLoQ serif logo in DashboardLayout header (verified on desktop 1920x1080)

logo_links_to_home.details: Logo wrapped in Link with href='/' - clicking navigates to home page

admin_login_flow.details: Click Admin role -> pre-fills admin@venuloq.in / admin123 -> Submit -> redirects to /admin/dashboard

search_filters_work.details: Wedding, Corporate, Reception, Birthday quick filter chips toggle correctly (active: bg-[#0B0B0D])

venue_cards_load.details: Venue cards load with images (aspect-[4/3]), ratings, and pricing - 'TOP PICK' badge visible

scroll_to_top_navigation.details: Page scrolls to top (scrollY=0) when navigating between routes

start_planning_cta.details: Sticky CTA shows 'Start Planning' text - clicking opens enquiry form with 'Start Planning Your Event'

no_old_branding.details: Old 'VENU|LOQ' branding NOT present on any page - fully replaced with unified BrandLogo component

design_specs.font: Cormorant Garamond, Playfair Display, Georgia, serif
design_specs.dark_mode: VenuLo in cream (#F4F1EC), Q in gold
design_specs.light_mode: VenuLo in obsidian (#0B0B0D), Q in gold
design_specs.tagline: FIND. COMPARE. LOCK. (DM Sans small caps)

context_for_next_testing_agent: BrandLogo unification complete. New BrandLogo component at /app/frontend/src/components/BrandLogo.js renders VenuLoQ serif wordmark (Cormorant Garamond) with golden Q (#D4B36A). Supports sizes (sm/md/lg/xl), dark/light modes, optional tagline and arch icon. All pages now use this unified component instead of the old inconsistent VENU|LOQ treatments.
